title: Grave of the Forgotten
description:
There is a single grave with a [jitter][aqua]roiling blue flame[/aqua][/jitter]...

A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it [sine]begging[/sine] to journey with you.

But perhaps it's better for it to face the [red]truth[/red]?

options.title: Confront with Truth
options.description: Add [red]Decay[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card that [gold]Exhausts[/gold] with [purple]SoulsPower[/purple].
options.requires: You have no cards with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that can be [purple]Enchanted[/purple].

notes: This event presents a choice between two paths for the restless soul. [gold]Accepting[/gold] provides ForgottenSoul relic with no cost. [gold]Confronting[/gold] requires at least one deck card that can be enchanted with SoulsPower; if available, it adds a Decay curse to the deck and applies SoulsPower enchantment to the selected card. The Confront option is only available if eligible cards exist in your deck.
